plugins.prepareCmd: sed -i.bak 's/^version = ".*"/version = "${nextRelease.version}"/' src-tauri/Cargo.toml && rm -f src-tauri/Cargo.toml.bak && cat src-tauri/tauri.conf.json | sed 's/"version": ".*"/"version": "${nextRelease.version}"/' > src-tauri/tauri.conf.json.tmp && mv src-tauri/tauri.conf.json.tmp src-tauri/tauri.conf.json
